heading: Today
text: Some patchy valley fog south, then mostly sunny in NY and west and south of I-89. Periods of clouds northeast, a few stray morning showers or sprinkles, then more periods of sun. Breezy and cool. Highs in the 50s, except 45 to 50 northeast. Winds becoming northwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear west and south of I-89, with some periods of clouds northeast. Lows in the 20s to near 30 north, low to mid 30s south. Winds north to northwest near 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph this evening.

heading: Friday
text: Sunshine west and south of I-89. Variable sun and clouds northeast. Highs in the 40s to low 50s north, in the 50s south. Winds north near 10 mph.
